title: JSON ↔ CSV Converter
description: Free online JSON to CSV and CSV to JSON converter. Paste your data, convert instantly in the browser with no upload required. Supports quoted fields and nested values.
empty: Paste JSON or CSV above to convert.

howToUse.label: Select direction
howToUse.description: Choose JSON → CSV to convert a JSON array to CSV, or CSV → JSON to parse a CSV file into a JSON array.

howToUse.label: Paste your data
howToUse.description: Paste your JSON array or CSV text into the left panel. Conversion happens automatically as you type.

howToUse.label: Copy the result
howToUse.description: Click the Copy button above the output to copy the result to your clipboard. Use ⇄ Swap to flip the direction using the current output as new input.

faq.question: What JSON format is supported?
faq.answer: The input must be a JSON array of objects (e.g. [{"a":1},{"a":2}]). The keys of the first object are used as CSV column headers. A single object (not wrapped in an array) is also accepted.

faq.question: Are quoted CSV fields with commas supported?
faq.answer: Yes. The CSV parser handles RFC 4180 quoting: fields that contain commas, quotes, or newlines are wrapped in double-quotes. Escaped double-quotes ("") inside quoted fields are handled correctly.

faq.question: What happens with nested JSON objects?
faq.answer: Nested objects and arrays are converted to their string representation (e.g. [object Object]). For nested data, flatten your JSON before converting.

faq.question: Is my data sent to a server?
faq.answer: No. All conversion happens entirely in your browser using JavaScript. Your data never leaves your device.
